content: MCP Python SDK (mcp package, v1.9.1+) supports stdio, SSE, and Streamable HTTP transports. SSE was deprecated in Dec 2025; Streamable HTTP is the current standard for serverless/production. For consuming MCP tools in a LangGraph agent: use langchain-mcp-adapters (requires mcp>=1.6, langgraph>=0.3). MultiServerMCPClient({'server': {'transport': 'streamable_http', 'url': 'http://server/mcp'}}) then await client.get_tools() returns LangChain-compatible tools. For hosting an MCP server on Vercel Python serverless: use fastmcp (incorporated into official MCP SDK as FastMCP) + FastAPI - stateless Streamable HTTP endpoint. Vercel supports Python MCP servers natively. fastmcp creates @mcp.tool decorators and serves over HTTP. The @vercel/mcp-adapter (now mcp-handler) exists but is JS-only; Python uses FastMCP + FastAPI directly.
